◎简　　介  

　　Journalist Stefanie Carlton is going to write a piece about Brooklyn Moore's Perfect Match and its success rate in Life/Style Magazine. To get the marketing she needs, Brooklyn decides to throw a summer love party. In the midst of all this her childhood friend Devin comes back into her life, and even though Stephanie has eyes on him, a flame still lingers between Devin and Broo...
